text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the spending time with me today. I
feel refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I have something planned after
this, so I must take my leave.
Hey, heeey!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's five minutes and ten seconds before our
designated meeting time. It's unlike you to be
early, Jordan.
choice_data_list: Oh, so you had plans with Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Well, we planned to meet, anyway. As for
our plans, however...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have yet to hear exactly what it is we're doing
today, Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For reals? Meh, we're just gonna wing it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wing it?! But we planned this outing nearly one month ago!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All right, okay. Don't have a cow! How about we
go to karaoke for starters?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What a noncommittal suggestion... Listen,
systematically mapping out plans is an important
part of—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Boo to plans! Going on vibes won't kill you for
just one day! Besides, spur-of-the-moment
karaoke is like, part of Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, of course! Everyone knows that. Anyway,
let's go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you should come with us too! The more the
merrier!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I really sang my heart out. 'Kay, Flash,
you're up.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I was contemplating the Japanese custom
of "going to karaoke for starters"...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Are you serious? Lol! It's not that big a deal, is it?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Before coming here as an exchange student, I
thoroughly studied recent trends in Japanese
culture... At least, I thought I had.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It appears Japan is progressing at a pace beyond
my expectations.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
How will I be able to keep up with a Japan that
keeps evolving at such a mind-boggling speed?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...D-dang. You're, like... really down about this. Uh...
What to do?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! Everyone learns about trends through
exposure!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In summary, experience is the best teacher, and
constant interaction with the latest elements of
Japanese culture is paramount...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I must sing the top-ranking J-pop
song. What is this? "Ramp"... "Ramp Up Love"!
choice_data_list: It's okay to stick with songs you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash starts singing the trendy J-pop song,
but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"I'm lost in love! ♪"
Ack, my rhythm is lagging 0.5 seconds behind the
melody once again...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
"My heart is full of you! ♪"
C'mon, Flash. Live it up!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah!
"Together, we rise! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So? Whaddya think of your first "unplanned
karaoke"?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well... I think I better understand why it is part of
Japanese culture now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Getting on more casual terms with music makes it
easier to understand the culture it hails from.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I totally made that up on the spot, so I was,
like, on edge the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You... did what?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Gah! That's not what I meant! Karaoke is all about
the vibes, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's a part of the culture... Or maybe... it's, like, my culture...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan gets a thorough scolding from
Eishin Flash after that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
True that! Singing something you know and love
is loads better than forcing yourself to sing
something random!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Would a German children's song be acceptable,
then? I am only really familiar with nursery
rhymes, to be frank.
choice_data_list: I'm not sure the machine has any...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
German nursery rhymes are often sung in Japan,
so I would assume so.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The frog-based "Kaeru no Uta" is the most
famous example.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that song's originally German? Like, no
cap? Even I know that one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, why don't we sing as a duet in German and
Japanese?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You would? In that case, let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So? Whaddya think of your first "unplanned
karaoke"?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well, it made me realize that I must constantly try
to stay abreast of new trends.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And if I had to summarize it in one word...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It would be "fun."
